_note: A file truncated inside an opening tag (`<div class="x"` at EOF) must surface a parse error — upstream's compiler fires `unexpected_eof` ("Unexpected end of input") and svelte-check reports it as a svelte-source error. finish_opening_tag used to propagate None at EOF without recording anything, so the truncated element silently vanished and the file checked clean (exit 0) while upstream exits 1.
